mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'CHECK' AS item_type, cr.id AS item_id, cr.register_id, p.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name AS project_name, cr.check_position AS project_position, cr.check_state AS state, cr.check_result AS result, mt.tech_price AS price, cr.creation_time FROM check_request cr LEFT JOIN register r ON cr.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON cr.medical_technology_id = mt.id UNION ALL SELECT 'INSPECTION' AS item_type, ir.id AS item_id, ir.register_id, p.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name AS project_name, ir.inspection_position AS project_position, ir.inspection_state AS state, ir.inspection_result AS result, mt.tech_price AS price, ir.creation_time FROM inspection_request ir LEFT JOIN register r ON ir.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON ir.medical_technology_id = mt.id UNION ALL SELECT 'DISPOSAL' AS item_type, dr.id AS item_id, dr.register_id, p.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name AS project_name, dr.disposal_position AS project_position, dr.disposal_state AS state, dr.disposal_result AS result, mt.tech_price AS price, dr.creation_time FROM disposal_request dr LEFT JOIN register r ON dr.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON dr.medical_technology_id = mt.id ) t WHERE 1=1 AND t.register_id = #{registerId} AND t.item_type = #{itemType} AND t.state = #{state} ORDER BY t.creation_time DESC, t.item_id DESC
